description: Top brands among veteran-designated registered passenger cars based on KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal registry flag. Use when user asks veteran/classic car counts or brands. State that results reflect the DMR registry veteran flag, not a derived age calculation. Danish veteran status = 35+ years old and largely original.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal == true | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 25
